story.title: Who was Rajiv Meherish? Indian-origin founder of the popular Dubai-based restaurant chain Raju Omlet who passed away
story.summary: Rajiv Meherish, the Indian-origin founder and CEO of Dubai-based restaurant chain Raju Omlet, passed away on July 19 after a brief illness. He launched the brand in 2013, growing it into seven outlets across Dubai. Business leaders remembered him as a humble and visionary entrepreneur.
